title: Rachel Douglas - What is IGMASS?
description:
Rachel Douglas, EIR Russia / CIS Countries Editor 
--
This presentation now includes the video produced by Russia's International Global Aerospace Monitoring Space System, and shown, courtesy of IGMASS, at the Schiller Institute conference March 23. It originally appeared on the Russian TV-Center program Popular Science, on Jan. 26, 2012.
--
SDI 30TH ANNIVERSARY CONFERENCE • MARCH 23, 2013
